sessions.summary: Build sprint: pivot from Vigil to Anima, full stack implementation

actions.description: PRD v0.1 — 10 agents, Courtyard on Polygon
Discovered Beezie as Courtyard alternative on Base — collapsed to single-chain architecture
Dropped Clawnch ($151 burn), switched to direct clanker-sdk. Reduced to 3 agents.
Frontend built: React + Vite + Tailwind + Mapbox GL globe with bioregion boundaries
Fixed 3 Astral SDK bugs: import casing, chain ID, geoJson vs geojson
Conservation mechanic ($TGN gate), Bankr LLM gateway integration, Beezie type gate removed
Backend deployed to Hetzner (api.anima.cards), SSL configured, 3-step capture flow finalized
Phanpy speaks: agent writes its own collaboration statement via Venice AI inference

artifacts.description: Frontend on Vercel, backend on Hetzner
Phanpy token deployed via Clanker SDK on Base

sessions.summary: Polish, security hardening, AZUSD integration, ERC-8004 compliance

actions.description: Fixed marker drift: replaced DOM markers with WebGL circle + symbol layers. Card art loaded via offscreen canvas.
Marker size +50%, Magnemite crop tuned (5 iterations), footer dock PFPs with click-to-fly
Bioregion permanent highlights + labels. Globe dimming removed on agent selection.
Ponyta relocated to NYC (NA10) for demo accessibility. Verified via shapely point-in-polygon.
Parallel agent sprint: Ponyta + Magnemite souls, server-side bioregion verification, conservation display, memory UI indicator
Security audit: identified 5 vulnerabilities. Plugged 3: server-side AZUSD + Beezie onchain verification, bioregion point-in-polygon.
Swapped $TGN → AZUSD (Azos Finance) as capture gate. ≥5 AZUSD required. Full frontend + backend migration.
Hackathon rules audit. Gated simulated Astral proofs behind DEMO_MODE only. Added ERC-8004 agent.json manifest.
Created agent.json (ERC-8004) and agent_log.json execution log for Protocol Labs bounty compliance
